title: (Bullish Signal) CLW, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling CLW's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor identified 44 similar cases where CLW's MACD histogram became positive, and 37 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 84%. Current price $34.70 crossed the resistance line at $34.80 and is trading between $34.80 resistance and $34.28 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/17/21 - 04/19/21, the price experienced a -9% Downtrend, while the week of 04/12/21 - 04/19/21 shows a +2% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/hbv9mz3akcu61.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=142ca4ccb559c50cfd2a5e1f99d2146fa6995aa5

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. c46 of 56 cases where CLW's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for CLW just turned positive on April 19, 2021. Looking at past instances where CLW's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 37 of 44 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

Following a +2.11% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where CLW advanced for three days, in 232 of 324 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.
